Why AcePass

Built different.
Built for you.

Not just another question bank. A complete exam prep system designed around how students actually learn.

🎯

Real JAMB Simulation

180 questions, 4 subjects, 60 minutes. Subject tabs, question map, flag and navigate — exactly like exam day.

📚

Topic-by-Topic Library

Every JAMB topic broken down — formulas, concepts, worked examples, and YouTube links. Study the right way.

📈

Progress Tracking

Every session saved. See your score trend, identify weak subjects, and watch your improvement over time.

💡

Personalised Study Plan

After every exam, get a custom 7-day study plan based on your exact score — which topics to fix and how.

⚡

AI Question Engine

When the bank runs out, Claude AI generates fresh unique questions in real time. Endless practice sessions.

🔒

Your Data, Your Progress

All your history saves automatically. Pick up where you left off, every session, every device.

How AcePass works: Select your 4-subject combo (English is compulsory) → practice 180 questions → get your score /400 → follow your personalised study plan → repeat until you hit your target.

Use of English is compulsory. Pick exactly 3 more subjects to match your JAMB registration.
